new_feature_requests.summary: Implement an admin-only `resetMaintenanceFund` function in the Motoko backend actor that resets the maintenance fund balance and related state, restricted to users with the admin role.

Wire the existing 'Reset Fund' admin button in the MaintenanceManagement frontend component to call the new `resetMaintenanceFund` backend function via a React Query mutation hook, displaying a success or error toast on completion.
